title: 9分达人听力6 Test 2 Listening
source: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

groups.title: Tour Booking Enquiry
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Type of holiday: $1$ Hotel: • meal: including $2$ • facilities: a pool, a nightclub and a $3$ • prices: reduce from € $4$ to €315 Self-catering Apartment: stay in a $5$ room Equipment Rental: rental for one week: € $6$ Types of Insurance: • $7$ cover: €30 • premier cover: € $8$ Transport: the cheapest way of going to the airport: by $9$ Payment Method: pay by $10$ : no extra fee

questions.title: Type of holiday: 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 holiday；提示词 Type，此处应填表示度假类型的名词。
题目解析：定位词 holiday 容易发生替换，注意抓取与类型相关的名词。听到工作人员问"What kind of trips ..."时就要集中注意力，随后听到 surfing、mountain climbing 和 biking 三种度假类型，但后两种是朋友的建议，属于干扰信息，surfing 才是顾客喜欢的类型。虽然后文中工作人员再次提及 biking，但随即进行了否定，并建议 follow your heart，顾客以 Right 回答表示认同。从做题技巧而言，如果空白处要求只填写一个单词，但录音中的词汇却以并列关系同时出现，往往可排除，因为无论从字数还是逻辑上都不符合要求。因此答案为 surfing。

questions.title: meal: including 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Hotel、meal；提示词 meal，此处应填表示酒店包餐类型的名词。
题目解析：通过预判，本题变得比较简单，答案范围一般包括 breakfast、lunch 和 dinner 这类词汇，通过小标题的 Hotel 定位后，很容易抓取到答案词。因此答案为 breakfast。

questions.title: facilities: a pool, a nightclub and a 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 pool、nightclub；提示词 facilities、a，此处应填表示设施的单数名词。
题目解析：在雅思听力中，常考的酒店设施有 spa、bar、gym 和 games room 等，平时要注意积累。本题较为简单，注意抓取与 pool、nightclub 并列的单数名词即可。因此答案为 gym。

questions.title: prices: reduce from €【   】 to €315
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 prices、€315；提示词 reduce from、€，此处应填数字，且为原价。
题目解析：本题考查对数字的反应速度以及对干扰信息的辨识。录音中的 how much does it cost 对应 prices，提示答案信息即将出现，随后听到："Well, it was originally 360 euros ..."其中 originally 意为"原来"，符合题干要求，而后面出现的 315 euros 为降价后的价格（题干已给出），为干扰信息。在雅思听力中，数字填空题不需要计算，都是原词给出。因此答案为 360。注意区分 60 和 16 的发音。

questions.title: stay in a 【   】 room
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Self-catering Apartment；提示词 a、room，此处应填形容词或名词。
题目解析：本题考查对住宿场景的认知，常考的房间类型有 single room、twin room 等，小标题 Self-catering Apartment 意为"自助公寓"，通常价格比较经济，但需要共用一些设施。该词不易发生替换，注意听工作人员之后的解释。题干较录音原文未发生改变，只需要抓取修饰 room 的词汇即可。因此答案为 shared。

questions.title: rental for one week: €【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Equipment Rental、one week；提示词 €，此处应填数字。
题目解析：本题考查对数字的反应速度以及对干扰信息的辨识。定位词 Equipment Rental 在录音中原词重现，随后工作人员介绍了租赁方式，接着顾客询问了价格，工作人员给出了 15 euros 和 75 euros 两个价格，前者是租一天的价格，而后者才是租一周的价格。因此答案为 75。

questions.title: 【   】 cover: €30
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Insurance、€30；提示词 Types、cover，此处应填表示保险类型的形容词或名词。
题目解析：定位词 Insurance 在录音中原词重现，注意听与保险类型相关的信息。录音中提到有两种保险类型，第一种是 basic coverage，其中 coverage 替换了题干中的 cover，其前修饰词即为答案，随后出现的 30 euros 帮助我们进一步确定了答案。因此答案为 basic。

questions.title: premier cover: €【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 premier cover；提示词 €，此处应填数字。
题目解析：本题依然考查对数字的反应速度。定位词 premier cover 原词重现后，答案句随即出现："It is more expensive at 42.50 euros."因此答案为 42.50 或 42.5。注意带小数点的数字的读法。

questions.title: the cheapest way of going to the airport: by 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Transport、airport；提示词 by，此处应填表示交通工具的名词。
题目解析：录音中先后出现了三种交通工具，分别是 minivan、shuttle 和 taxi。注意题干的条件限定为 the cheapest 和 to the airport，minivan 是下飞机之后接顾客去旅馆（to the hotel）的工具，工作人员说顾客需要自己去机场（to London airport），顾客提出自己乘坐 shuttle 去机场，不过工作人员建议乘坐 taxi，并说："It is much cheaper than other types of transport, including the airport shuttle."其中 much cheaper than other types of transport 替换了题干中的 the cheapest。因此答案为 taxi。

questions.title: pay by 【   】 : no extra fee
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 pay、no extra fee；提示词 pay by，此处应填表示支付方式的名词。
题目解析：在雅思听力中，常考的支付方式有 cash、credit card 和 cheque/check 这三大类，个别情况还考查过 online payment，平时多注意积累场景考点词有助于预判时缩小答案范围。本题先是听到顾客问是否能用 credit cards 支付，工作人员回答 Yes，紧接着的转折信号词 But 提示我们有附加情况，即会收取少量费用（a slight charge），不符合题干限定 no extra fee，可排除。然后工作人员给出了自己的建议，no extra fee 同时出现。因此答案为 cheque 或其美式拼写 check。

transcript.en: Customer: Good afternoon.
transcript.cn: 下午好。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Good afternoon.
transcript.cn: 下午好。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Atlanta Travel Agency, may I help you?
transcript.cn: 亚特兰大旅行社，有什么可以帮您的吗？

transcript.en: Customer: I saw your advert in the newspaper this morning and decided to come over for more detailed information about some trips that you currently offer.
transcript.cn: 我今天早上在报纸上看到了你们的广告，就过来想详细了解一下你们现在提供的一些旅行线路。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: What kind of trips do you have in mind?
transcript.cn: 您想找什么样的旅行呢？

transcript.en: Customer: Well, I enjoy surfing very much and want to get tanned, but all my friends suggest either mountain climbing or biking.
transcript.cn: 嗯，我特别喜欢冲浪，也想晒晒太阳，不过我朋友们都建议要么去爬山，要么去骑行。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: We currently offer all the three types.
transcript.cn: 这三种我们现在都有。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Even though biking is the most popular type of holiday, it doesn't work for everyone.
transcript.cn: 虽然骑行是最受欢迎的度假类型，但并不是适合所有人。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: I think you should follow your heart.
transcript.cn: 我觉得你应该跟着自己的心走。

transcript.en: Customer: Right.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Customer: What are my options for accommodation then?
transcript.cn: 那我住宿方面有哪些选择呢？

transcript.en: Travel Agent: For this type of holiday, you can choose to stay in a hotel or a self-catering apartment.
transcript.cn: 这种度假类型，您可以选择住酒店，或者住带厨房的自助式公寓。

transcript.en: Customer: Can you introduce the hotel package first?
transcript.cn: 能先给我介绍一下酒店套餐吗？

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Sure.
transcript.cn: 当然可以。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: The price for our hotel package is quite reasonable compared with that of your own reservation.
transcript.cn: 我们酒店套餐的价格，跟您自己订相比是相当划算的。

transcript.en: Customer: What does the price include?
transcript.cn: 这个价格都包含些什么？

transcript.en: Travel Agent: It covers the beachside hotel and free breakfast.
transcript.cn: 包含海边的酒店和免费早餐。

transcript.en: Customer: Good.
transcript.cn: 不错。

transcript.en: Customer: Does the hotel have any recreational facilities?
transcript.cn: 酒店有什么娱乐设施吗？

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Oh, rest assured.
transcript.cn: 哦，这您放心。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: The hotel is fully equipped with a pool, a nightclub and a gym.
transcript.cn: 酒店配套齐全，有游泳池、夜总会，还有健身房。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Guests can enjoy a vibrant nightlife during their stay at the hotel.
transcript.cn: 客人住在酒店期间可以享受丰富的夜生活。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Five-star ratings are common for the hotel's satisfying service.
transcript.cn: 凭借酒店令人满意的服务，五星好评是很常见的。

transcript.en: Customer: So how much does it cost?
transcript.cn: 那要多少钱呢？

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Well, it was originally 360 euros for an adult, but we are now offering a Labour Day promotion.
transcript.cn: 这个嘛，成人原价是360欧元，不过我们现在有劳动节的促销活动。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: You can get a discount of 12.5%.
transcript.cn: 您可以享受12.5%的折扣。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: So that's ... 315 euros for now, a really good deal.
transcript.cn: 所以现在算下来是……315欧元，真的很划算。

transcript.en: Customer: Right.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Customer: What about the self-catering apartment?
transcript.cn: 那自助式公寓呢？

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Oh, that'll be even cheaper.
transcript.cn: 哦，那个还要更便宜。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: But you have to stay in a shared room with other guests.
transcript.cn: 不过您得跟其他客人住合住房间。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Each room has 6 bunk beds with lockers.
transcript.cn: 每个房间有6张带储物柜的上下铺。

transcript.en: Customer: OK ... I think the hotel is much better.
transcript.cn: 好吧……我觉得还是酒店好多了。

transcript.en: Customer: Getting a good night's sleep is critical for a relaxing holiday.
transcript.cn: 睡个好觉对放松的假期来说太重要了。

transcript.en: Customer: I can't stand sharing a room with someone who snores all night long.
transcript.cn: 我可受不了跟一个整晚打呼噜的人合住一个房间。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Can't agree more.
transcript.cn: 太赞同了。

transcript.en: Customer: What about the surfing equipment rental?
transcript.cn: 那冲浪装备租赁怎么样？

transcript.en: Customer: I don't want to bring my own surfboard.
transcript.cn: 我不想自己带冲浪板过来。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: You can hire a surfboard by the hour, day or week.
transcript.cn: 您可以按小时、按天或者按周来租冲浪板。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Just book it in advance, and it will be delivered to the hotel or even directly to the beach.
transcript.cn: 只要提前预订，就会送到酒店，甚至直接送到海滩上。

transcript.en: Customer: How much does it cost?
transcript.cn: 那要多少钱？

transcript.en: Travel Agent: It costs 15 euros for a day.
transcript.cn: 租一天是15欧元。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: But for a week's rental, it's just 75 euros.
transcript.cn: 但要是租一周的话，只要75欧元。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: The surf station also provides surf lessons if you're interested.
transcript.cn: 如果您感兴趣的话，冲浪站还提供冲浪课程。

transcript.en: Customer: That's good to know.
transcript.cn: 那太好了，知道这个真不错。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Oh, there's one more thing you should know.
transcript.cn: 哦，还有一件事您得知道。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Just in case of an accident during your trip, we recommend each customer to have the correct travel cover in place before leaving home.
transcript.cn: 以防旅途中发生意外，我们建议每位客人在出门前都办好合适的旅行保险。

transcript.en: Customer: Please tell me about it.
transcript.cn: 请给我讲讲吧。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Well, we mainly offer two types of insurance.
transcript.cn: 嗯，我们主要提供两种保险。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: The first one is basic coverage.
transcript.cn: 第一种是基础保障。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: It costs 30 euros.
transcript.cn: 价格是30欧元。

transcript.en: Customer: What does it include?
transcript.cn: 这个都包含什么呢？

transcript.en: Travel Agent: It covers medical treatment during your trip and things like missing your flight, flight delays and cancellations.
transcript.cn: 它涵盖旅途中的医疗，还有像误机、航班延误和取消这类情况。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: But you know extreme sports can be quite dangerous, and therefore injuries during these activities are excluded.
transcript.cn: 但您也知道极限运动挺危险的，所以这些活动中受的伤是不在保障范围内的。

transcript.en: Customer: Then, how about the other one?
transcript.cn: 那另外一种呢？

transcript.en: Travel Agent: The second one is called premier cover.
transcript.cn: 第二种叫尊享保障。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: It is more expensive at 42.50 euros.
transcript.cn: 这个贵一些，要42.50欧元。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: But we highly recommend this one for regular surfers.
transcript.cn: 但对经常冲浪的人，我们非常推荐这一种。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: If you receive an injury or hurt anyone else while participating in extreme sports like surfing, you are fully covered.
transcript.cn: 如果您在冲浪这类极限运动中受了伤，或者伤到了别人，都能得到全额保障。

transcript.en: Customer: I see.
transcript.cn: 我明白了。

transcript.en: Customer: I think I'll go with the premier cover.
transcript.cn: 我想我会选尊享保障。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: When your flight gets in, there will be a minivan to pick you up at the airport and take you to the hotel.
transcript.cn: 您航班到了以后，会有一辆小面包车到机场接您，送您去酒店。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: But you'll have to get to London airport yourself.
transcript.cn: 不过您得自己想办法到伦敦机场。

transcript.en: Customer: It's alright.
transcript.cn: 没问题。

transcript.en: Customer: I'll just take the airport shuttle.
transcript.cn: 我坐机场大巴就行。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Actually, I personally suggest you take a taxi.
transcript.cn: 其实呢，我个人建议您打出租车。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: It is much cheaper than other types of transport, including the airport shuttle.
transcript.cn: 它比其他交通方式都便宜得多，包括机场大巴。

transcript.en: Customer: Thanks for the tip.
transcript.cn: 谢谢您的建议。

transcript.en: Customer: I think I'll book a trip for next weekend.
transcript.cn: 我想我就订下周末的行程吧。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: OK, how would you like to pay?
transcript.cn: 好的，您想怎么付款呢？

transcript.en: Customer: Do you accept credit cards?
transcript.cn: 你们收信用卡吗？

transcript.en: Travel Agent: Yes, we do.
transcript.cn: 收的。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: But there will be a slight charge on that.
transcript.cn: 不过那样会收取一点儿手续费。

transcript.en: Travel Agent: If you pay by cheque, there is no extra fee.
transcript.cn: 如果您用支票付款，就没有额外费用。

transcript.en: Customer: Great.
transcript.cn: 太好了。

transcript.en: Customer: I'll write you a cheque then ...
transcript.cn: 那我就给你们开张支票……

groups.title: Items Received at Check-in
groups.question_title: Which TWO items will participants receive when they check in?
groups.desc:
Questions 11 and 12
Choose TWO letters, A-E.

collect_option.title: Which TWO items will participants receive when they check in?

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 participants、check in；提示词 receive。
题目解析：本篇录音的开头较长，有可能使考生因一直听不到答案出现而感到紧张。不过 participants 和 check in 在录音中原词重现，还是比较容易定位的，需要注意的是，题干的条件限定为 receive，也就是说，需要选出舞蹈课会提供给学员的东西。定位词出现后，随即听到："…they will be given a class list printed with available seasonal classes …"其中 be given 符合 receive，选项 A 正确。接着，并列信号词 also 提示另一个答案的出现："The dance studio will also give you a complimentary shoe bag to store your dance shoes."其中 complimentary 意为"免费的"，give 也符合 receive，故选项 D 正确。其他三个选项也在录音中出现了，但都是学员需要自己准备的东西，不符合 receive 限定。因此答案为 A & D。

groups.question_title: Which TWO activities will be hosted in the first afternoon and evening?

Questions 13 and 14
Choose TWO letters, A-E.

collect_option.title: Which TWO activities will be hosted in the first afternoon and evening?

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 activities；提示词 in the first afternoon and evening。
题目解析：本题需要注意题干中的时间限定 in the first afternoon and evening，即签到第一天的下午和晚上，注意排除不符合该限定的描述。定位词 activities 出现后，先听到了选项 A，但随即通过转折信号词 but 予以否定，指出 costume making 是在明天，可排除。接着录音提到了 practice dance with music，与选项 B 的 musical show 并不是一回事；即使没反应过来，也可通过 whenever the studio is available 不符合题干的时间限定，排除选项 B。之后，时间限定词 in the first afternoon and evening 在录音中原词重现，注意听其后描述："… there will be an introduction to the development of dance for the past few decades."其中 introduction 替换了选项 D 中的 talk，development of … for the past few decades 替换了 history，故选项 D 正确。紧接着，另一个答案信息由表示序列关系的信号词 Then 引出："Then we'll warm up with an informal dance."故选项 C 正确。最后，工作人员提到了 dance test，不过通过否定信号词 won't 可排除。因此答案为 C & D。

questions.title: shower room
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 shower room。
题目解析：地图题审题时注意观察图中所有可用于定位的已知信息。本题考查地图题动态定位，起点位置在图上已经标出，首先听到："To your left you can see two rooms in a row."也就是图上的 E 和 C 两个房间。随后出现了含定位词的动态描述："Just go straight ahead, turn left, and the shower room is on your left-hand side."即直走、左转、左手边的房间。注意需要左转，因此答案为 C。

questions.title: bunkroom
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 bunkroom。
题目解析：本题考查地图题动态定位。与上一题衔接较快，注意定位。听到 bunkroom 后，出现了动态描述："It's immediately to the left of where you are standing, right before the shower room."说明房间就在起点位置的左手边，淋浴间的前面。需要注意的是，before 之前的内容在时间上应该是先出现的，按照行进路线，左手边先出现的应该是 E。因此答案为 E。

questions.title: games room
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 games room。
题目解析：本题考查地图题动态定位。注意结合定位词听方位描述。听到 games room 后，出现了动态描述："Just take the first right; it is the second area to your right."也就是从起点位置起，第一个路口右转，右手边第二个区域。因此答案为 I。

questions.title: reception
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 reception。
题目解析：本题考查地图题静态定位。定位词出现后，有较长的内容在介绍接待处提供的服务，此时需要耐心等待方位信息的出现："The reception is located in the centre, to the south of the music room."说明其位于中心区域，图上已知信息 Music room 的南面。因此答案为 F。

questions.title: medical centre
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 medical centre。
题目解析：本题考查地图题静态定位。定位词紧跟上一题之后出现，注意抓取方位信息，听到："It's right opposite the reception, to the left of the music room."说明其位于 reception 的对面，图上已知信息 Music room 的左边。因此答案为 D。

questions.title: store
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 store。
题目解析：本题考查地图题动态定位。听到 store 后，注意方位描述，听到："To reach it, keep straight on until you get to the third passageway, turn right, and it's the one after the gym."也就是从起点位置起走，在第三个通道处右转，过了 Gym 就是。需要注意的是，after 之前的内容在时间上应该是后出现的，按照行进路线，在 Gym 后出现的只能是 B。因此答案为 B。

transcript.en: On behalf of our Community Centre, I'd like to welcome you all here today.
transcript.cn: 我谨代表我们社区中心，欢迎大家今天来到这里。

transcript.en: My name is Mary Lyndon.
transcript.cn: 我叫玛丽·林登。

transcript.en: As you can see here, this multi-purpose hall is a great venue for various events, including banquets, seminars or dances.
transcript.cn: 大家可以看到，这个多功能厅是举办各类活动的绝佳场地，包括宴会、研讨会或者舞会。

transcript.en: The centre provides services for all ages.
transcript.cn: 中心为各个年龄段的人提供服务。

transcript.en: As the majority of you have already signed up for our dance workshops, I'll introduce relevant information first before we start the tour and get ourselves oriented.
transcript.cn: 由于你们大多数人已经报名了我们的舞蹈工作坊，我先介绍一下相关信息，然后咱们再开始参观、熟悉一下环境。

transcript.en: OK, now when participants check in for their first dancing session, they will be given a class list printed with available seasonal classes ranging from Zumba to Ballet as well as detailed descriptions and schedules.
transcript.cn: 好，现在，学员来参加第一次舞蹈课签到时，会拿到一张课程单，上面印着当季可选的课程，从尊巴到芭蕾都有，还附有详细的介绍和课表。

transcript.en: The dance studio will also give you a complimentary shoe bag to store your dance shoes.
transcript.cn: 舞蹈工作室还会免费送你一个鞋袋，用来装你的舞鞋。

transcript.en: Every week will be a surprise in cardio movement.
transcript.cn: 每周的有氧动作都会有惊喜。

transcript.en: Our fitness professional will guide you through an upbeat, heart-pumping, lively dance class.
transcript.cn: 我们的健身专家会带你上一堂节奏欢快、让心跳加速、充满活力的舞蹈课。

transcript.en: Therefore it is highly advised to bring a face towel and a water bottle with you.
transcript.cn: 所以强烈建议你随身带一条擦脸巾和一个水瓶。

transcript.en: As things get mixed up easily, you might also want to attach a name tag to your belongings.
transcript.cn: 因为东西很容易弄混，你可能还想给自己的物品贴个名牌。

transcript.en: It will be sent to you by mail in advance.
transcript.cn: 这个会提前邮寄给你。

transcript.en: Now let us get a closer look at our dance workshops and its curriculum.
transcript.cn: 现在，咱们来仔细看看我们的舞蹈工作坊和它的课程安排。

transcript.en: There is a list of activities to participate during and after each session.
transcript.cn: 每次课上和课后都有一系列可以参加的活动。

transcript.en: You'll have the chance to make your own costume, but it won't be held until tomorrow.
transcript.cn: 你会有机会亲手制作自己的服装，不过那要到明天才举办。

transcript.en: You can also practice dance with music whenever the studio is available.
transcript.cn: 只要工作室有空，你也可以随时跟着音乐练舞。

transcript.en: In the first afternoon and evening of your dance class, there will be an introduction to the development of dance for the past few decades.
transcript.cn: 在你舞蹈课的第一天下午和晚上，会有一个关于过去几十年舞蹈发展的介绍。

transcript.en: Then we'll warm up with an informal dance.
transcript.cn: 然后我们会用一场非正式的舞蹈来热身。

transcript.en: I know you don't have much experience in dancing but we'll get there soon.
transcript.cn: 我知道你们跳舞经验不多，但我们很快就能上手的。

transcript.en: Rest assured, there won't be a dance test until the end of the course.
transcript.cn: 放心，要到课程结束时才会有舞蹈测试。

transcript.en: OK, now a word about the layout of the centre.
transcript.cn: 好，现在说说中心的布局。

transcript.en: Our beautiful facility has 25 rooms altogether which are both very functional and aesthetically pleasing.
transcript.cn: 我们这座漂亮的场馆一共有25个房间，既非常实用又赏心悦目。

transcript.en: We are standing here, right at the entrance.
transcript.cn: 我们现在站的地方，正好在入口处。

transcript.en: To your left you can see two rooms in a row.
transcript.cn: 在你左手边，可以看到一排两个房间。

transcript.en: After each dance session, you are probably soaking in sweat and in desperate need of a shower.
transcript.cn: 每次舞蹈课结束后，你可能浑身是汗，特别想冲个澡。

transcript.en: Just go straight ahead, turn left, and the shower room is on your left-hand side.
transcript.cn: 只要一直往前走，左转，淋浴间就在你左手边。

transcript.en: If you just want to take a nap, there is a six-bed bunkroom.
transcript.cn: 如果你只想小睡一会儿，这里有一间六张床的多铺位宿舍。

transcript.en: It's immediately to the left of where you are standing, right before the shower room.
transcript.cn: 它就在你现在站的位置左手边，正好在淋浴间前面。

transcript.en: We also have a games room with dartboards, table tennis, pool and card games.
transcript.cn: 我们还有一间娱乐室，配有飞镖靶、乒乓球、台球和纸牌游戏。

transcript.en: It is a good place to have fun with friends.
transcript.cn: 这是跟朋友一起玩乐的好地方。

transcript.en: Just take the first right; it is the second area to your right.
transcript.cn: 在第一个路口右转就到了；它在你右手边的第二个区域。

transcript.en: You can explore it well later during our tour.
transcript.cn: 待会儿参观的时候你可以好好逛逛。

transcript.en: Further ahead in the corner there are the bike racks.
transcript.cn: 再往前走，在拐角处有自行车停放架。

transcript.en: You can either park your bike here or hire one if you want a ride.
transcript.cn: 你可以把自行车停在这里，想骑车的话也可以租一辆。

transcript.en: The first hour is free.
transcript.cn: 第一个小时是免费的。

transcript.en: Part of our dance sessions will take place in the music room.
transcript.cn: 我们有一部分舞蹈课会在音乐室进行。

transcript.en: It has a large mirror with various musical instruments and state-of-the-art stereos.
transcript.cn: 里面有一面大镜子，配有各种乐器和最先进的音响。

transcript.en: If you want to get there, just go straight, take the second right, and it's the second area to your left.
transcript.cn: 如果你想去那儿，就一直走，在第二个路口右转，它在你左手边的第二个区域。

transcript.en: Our friendly reception team is an invaluable resource for any visitor to the centre.
transcript.cn: 我们友好的前台团队对来中心的每一位访客来说都是宝贵的资源。

transcript.en: If your mobile phone needs charging, we have several adapters and can easily get your phone back up and running again.
transcript.cn: 如果你的手机需要充电，我们有好几种转接头，能轻松让你的手机重新用起来。

transcript.en: We also offer a range of chargeable services including photocopy, scanning and faxing.
transcript.cn: 我们还提供一系列收费服务，包括复印、扫描和传真。

transcript.en: The reception is located in the centre, to the south of the music room.
transcript.cn: 前台位于中心区域，在音乐室的南面。

transcript.en: There is a medical centre providing a full spectrum of care and treatment, especially for sports injuries like a sprained knee.
transcript.cn: 这里有一个医疗中心，提供全方位的护理和治疗，尤其是像扭伤膝盖这类运动损伤。

transcript.en: It's right opposite the reception, to the left of the music room.
transcript.cn: 它正好在前台对面，在音乐室的左边。

transcript.en: Now, I have to tell you about our gym where some of our dance sessions take place.
transcript.cn: 现在，我得跟你们讲讲我们的健身房，我们有一些舞蹈课就在那里上。

transcript.en: It is also equipped with the latest equipment, including exercise bikes, treadmills, rowing machines, etc.
transcript.cn: 它也配备了最新的设备，包括健身单车、跑步机、划船机等等。

transcript.en: If you walk straight ahead before you come to the end and turn right, it's the second room to your left.
transcript.cn: 如果你一直往前走，快到尽头时右转，它就是你左手边的第二个房间。

transcript.en: And speaking of food, if you ever feel hungry, you can either cook in the kitchen or grab a snack at the store.
transcript.cn: 说到吃的，如果你饿了，可以在厨房自己做饭，或者在小卖部买点零食。

transcript.en: To reach it, keep straight on until you get to the third passageway, turn right, and it's the one after the gym.
transcript.cn: 去那儿的话，一直往前走，走到第三个通道右转，它就在健身房过去那间。

transcript.en: And the kitchen sits right next to the gym on the same side of the passageway.
transcript.cn: 厨房就紧挨着健身房，在通道的同一侧。

transcript.en: It has all the utensils you'll need, spatulas, frying pans, ladles and plates, you name it.
transcript.cn: 里面你需要的厨具一应俱全，锅铲、煎锅、汤勺、盘子，应有尽有。

transcript.en: Just feel free to use it.
transcript.cn: 尽管随意使用。

transcript.en: By the way, if you have coats, umbrellas or any large bags with you, the cloakroom is available.
transcript.cn: 对了，如果你带了外套、雨伞或者什么大包，可以用寄存处。

transcript.en: It's the room in the top right corner on the far side.
transcript.cn: 它是最里面右上角的那个房间。

transcript.en: Right, well, if you're ready, we'll start the tour of our lovely community centre.
transcript.cn: 好，那么如果大家准备好了，我们就开始参观我们可爱的社区中心吧。

groups.title: Assignment Feedback
groups.desc:
Questions 21 and 22
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.collect: Assignment Feedback Things that need to be done: • hand in book reports with the next assignment • check accuracy of the $21$ in the last section • give more $22$ • expand ideas to improve the grade

questions.title: check accuracy of the 【   】 in the last section
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 book reports、last section；提示词 the，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题定位词 last section 在录音中被替换为 at the end，比较容易错过，所以结合上一条已给信息中的定位词 book reports 和对话的推进更容易定位。在听到 book reports 时应集中注意力听导师要说的下一个问题，先是由并列信号词 And（此外）引导出问题，此处定位词 last section 的替换词出现，随后听到答案句："Don't forget to go through and make sure that your references are accurate."其中 go through 替换了题干中的 check，accurate 对应其名词形式 accuracy，不难识别，附近的名词即为答案。因此答案为 references。

questions.title: give more 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 give more，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题没有较好的定位词，注意理解对话并抓取合适的名词代入题干。在上一问题谈话结束之后，导师接着说作业中的另一个问题："Now, you made some good points but it might be helpful if you could include a few other examples, just to drive your point home."其中 include 替换了题干中的 give，a few other 替换了 more，其后名词即为答案。注意随后听到了干扰信息 more paragraphs，但通过开头的否定信号词 Don't 可排除。因此答案为 examples。

groups.title: Karen's Presentation
groups.desc:
Questions 23-27
Answer the questions below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.title: When will Karen give her presentation?
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 presentation；提示词 When，此处应填时间类名词。
题目解析：简答题这一题型在雅思听力中总体出现较少，难度不大，因为该题型的定位信息一般都比较明确，要填写的答案类型也比较明确。注意题目的字数要求，原文原词填写即可。本题先是听到定位词 presentation 出现，随后提示词和时间类名词 next term 出现，但由于是以问句形式出现，需继续往后听寻找肯定回复，导师回答："… so you agreed to do it at the next seminar."因此答案为 next seminar。

questions.title: What must she do during the presentation?
questions.answer: explain (the) experiment / explain the experiment / explain experiment
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 What must she do，此处应填动宾结构。
题目解析：本题与上一题的定位词重合，所以建议通过对话的推进来定位，寻找符合答案预判的动作信息。上一题结束之后，学生问 presentation 的 key part 是什么，注意导师的回答："… so it's absolutely essential for you to explain the experiment."其中 absolutely essential 的含义对应题干中的 must，符合预判的动作且比较合理的信息只有 explain the experiment。冠词 the 信息价值较弱，在符合题目字数要求的情况下，可填可不填。因此答案为 explain (the) experiment。

questions.title: By which date does she have to submit an abstract?
questions.answer: 26(th) November / 26th November / 26 November / November 26(th) / November 26th / November 26
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 abstract；提示词 By which date，此处应填日期。
题目解析：本题比较容易定位，在听到 abstract 之后出现了两个日期，后一个日期以问句形式出现，但随后得到了学生的肯定答复。因此答案为 26(th) November 或 November 26(th)。

questions.title: Where will the presentation take place?
questions.answer: (the) chemistry lab / the chemistry lab / chemistry lab
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 Where，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：本题虽没有明显的定位词，但答案类型方向比较明确，通过对话推进寻找地点类名词即可。导师先提到讨论下"where the presentation is going to be made"，预示答案信息即将出现，首先听到了 the computer room，不过以 far from suitable（完全不合适）予以了否定，接着听到了 the chemistry lab，说 big enough，学生给予肯定回答。因此答案为 (the) chemistry lab。

questions.title: Who will grade her presentation?
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 grade；提示词 Who，此处应填表示人的名词。
题目解析：本题比较容易定位，定位词 grade 出现后，注意听导师的回答："… your first one was graded by your tutor, but this one will be scored by the professor."需要注意的是，tutor 用 first 和 was 限定，提示这是过去的情况，为干扰信息。因此答案为 (the) professor。

groups.title: Modules Karen Will Study Next Year
groups.question_title: Which THREE modules will Karen study next year?

collect_option.title: Which THREE modules will Karen study next year?

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 modules、next year；提示词 next year。
题目解析：题干中的 module 意为"课程模块"，8 个选项均为课程名称，不会发生替换，且它们均在录音中出现了，因此本部分的核心考点在于对干扰信息的否定识别。首先，听到了选项 B，随后以 wasn't 否定，可排除。其次，听到了选项 D 和选项 A 一起出现，逻辑上并列，但话锋一转说："Anyway, I went for Communication Skills in the end …"最终选择了 A，意味着否定了 D。接着，听到了选项 H，同样以否定表达 didn't bother 排除。而选项 C 出现时，则伴以积极态度信息 really interesting 予以了肯定，故正确。选项 G 紧跟着出现，不过以 rather than 予以否定。而后提及选项 F，同样用 interesting 展现了积极态度，故正确。最后，听到了选项 E，不过导师用 No 进行了否定。因此答案为 A & C & F。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Oh, Karen.
transcript.cn: 哦，凯伦。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Hi, come in, take a seat.
transcript.cn: 嗨，进来吧，坐。

transcript.en: Course tutor: I wanted to talk to you about this assignment you've handed in.
transcript.cn: 我想跟你聊聊你交上来的这份作业。

transcript.en: Course tutor: I'll give it back to you with detailed feedback, but first there are a few things I'd like to run over.
transcript.cn: 我会连同详细的反馈一起还给你，不过先有几点我想跟你过一遍。

transcript.en: Course tutor: You know pointers for next time.
transcript.cn: 就是给你下次的一些提示。

transcript.en: Course tutor: When you hand in your next assignment, can you ensure that you've gone through these aspects?
transcript.cn: 你下次交作业的时候，能确保这几个方面都检查过吗？

transcript.en: Karen: Hum, sure, will do.
transcript.cn: 嗯，好的，我会的。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Now, the first thing is your literature review.
transcript.cn: 那第一点，是你的文献综述。

transcript.en: Course tutor: It was not sufficient enough so I would like to see your book reports to get your complete view.
transcript.cn: 写得不够充分，所以我想看看你的读书报告，好完整了解你的想法。

transcript.en: Course tutor: So can you submit those with the next assignment?
transcript.cn: 所以你能连同下次的作业一起把那些交上来吗？

transcript.en: Course tutor: Then I can find out which parts you've chosen to leave out.
transcript.cn: 这样我就能看出你选择省略了哪些部分。

transcript.en: Karen: Oh, yes.
transcript.cn: 哦，好的。

transcript.en: Karen: Sorry, I didn't realise you needed them.
transcript.cn: 抱歉，我没意识到你需要那些。

transcript.en: Karen: It did cross my mind that what I've handed in is a bit thin, but then I started to work on another project and forgot to revise it.
transcript.cn: 我当时确实想到过交上去的东西有点单薄，但后来我开始忙另一个项目，就忘了修改了。

transcript.en: Course tutor: That's alright.
transcript.cn: 没关系。

transcript.en: Course tutor: And I've found some errors, just small ones where you had quoted people but not recorded the information properly at the end.
transcript.cn: 另外我还发现了一些错误，都是些小问题，就是你引用了别人的话，但最后没有把信息正确地记录下来。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Don't forget to go through and make sure that your references are accurate.
transcript.cn: 别忘了从头检查一遍，确保你的参考文献是准确的。

transcript.en: Course tutor: They were very relevant, though.
transcript.cn: 不过它们都很切题。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Just check and revise them using the format sample that I've emailed you beforehand, OK?
transcript.cn: 只要用我之前邮件发给你的那个格式样本检查修改一下就行，好吗？

transcript.en: Karen: Yes, I'll remember to check them.
transcript.cn: 好的，我会记得检查的。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Now, you made some good points but it might be helpful if you could include a few other examples, just to drive your point home.
transcript.cn: 还有，你提出了一些很好的观点，不过如果你能再加几个别的例子来把你的论点说透，可能会更好。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Don't start writing more paragraphs; just slot them in at the end of what you've already written.
transcript.cn: 别再另起段落写了；直接把它们插到你已经写好的内容后面就行。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Now the thing you have to do, if you really want to get a better mark, is expand the ideas you're presenting.
transcript.cn: 还有，如果你真想拿个更好的分数，你得做的就是把你阐述的观点展开讲深。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Then your argument becomes more valid.
transcript.cn: 这样你的论证才更有说服力。

transcript.en: Karen: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Karen: Hum, can I talk to you about this presentation I've got to do?
transcript.cn: 嗯，我能跟您聊聊我要做的这个演讲吗？

transcript.en: Course tutor: Sure, of course.
transcript.cn: 当然可以。

transcript.en: Karen: When shall I stage what we've studied?
transcript.cn: 我什么时候把我们学的内容展示出来呢？

transcript.en: Karen: Am I doing it next term?
transcript.cn: 是下学期做吗？

transcript.en: Karen: I can't remember what we said.
transcript.cn: 我记不清我们当时是怎么说的了。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Well, the thing is, Marco couldn't do it, so you agreed to do it at the next seminar.
transcript.cn: 这样，情况是马可做不了，所以你答应了在下次研讨会上做。

transcript.en: Course tutor: So how can I help?
transcript.cn: 那我能帮你什么呢？

transcript.en: Karen: Um … actually, I'm wondering what you suggest to be the key part of the presentation.
transcript.cn: 嗯……其实，我想知道您建议把哪部分作为演讲的重点。

transcript.en: Karen: I mean, which part should I spend most of my time on?
transcript.cn: 我是说，我应该在哪部分上花最多的时间？

transcript.en: Course tutor: That's a question to the point.
transcript.cn: 这个问题问到点子上了。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Well, you have very little time really, so it's absolutely essential for you to explain the experiment.
transcript.cn: 嗯，你的时间其实非常有限，所以你把实验讲清楚是绝对关键的。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Of course, you'll have a summary in the handouts you give out but you can still start the presentation with that.
transcript.cn: 当然，你发的讲义里会有个摘要，不过你还是可以用它来开场。

transcript.en: Course tutor: It's optional, though.
transcript.cn: 不过那是可选的。

transcript.en: Karen: And do I have to give you the abstract first, or shall I just email it to all the students?
transcript.cn: 那我要先把摘要给您呢，还是直接邮件发给所有学生？

transcript.en: Course tutor: Uh, no.
transcript.cn: 呃，不用。

transcript.en: Course tutor: I do need to see it first and see if it needs to be polished up.
transcript.cn: 我确实得先看看，看看它需不需要润色一下。

transcript.en: Course tutor: And then we'll get some printouts done.
transcript.cn: 然后我们再把它打印出来。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Now, they'll need to be done by 3rd December, so I'll need to see it by 26th November if that's OK?
transcript.cn: 这些得在12月3日之前弄好，所以如果可以的话，我需要在11月26日之前看到它？

transcript.en: Karen: Yes, fine.
transcript.cn: 行，没问题。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Oh, and I need to talk to you about where the presentation is going to be made.
transcript.cn: 哦，我还得跟你说说演讲要在哪里做。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Given the actual number of participants and audience, we've had problems with the rooms because we'll need something bigger than usual.
transcript.cn: 考虑到实际的参与人数和听众，我们在场地上遇到了些麻烦，因为我们需要一个比平常更大的地方。

transcript.en: Course tutor: In our faculty, the only room available is the computer room, which is far from suitable considering the layout of the room, so we'll have to go across the road and do it in the chemistry lab.
transcript.cn: 在我们院里，唯一空着的房间是机房，但考虑到房间的布局那儿很不合适，所以我们只能过马路，去化学实验室做。

transcript.en: Course tutor: It's big enough to accommodate everyone and is equipped with the proper overhead projector in there as well.
transcript.cn: 那儿够大，能容下所有人，而且里面也配有合适的投影仪。

transcript.en: Karen: OK, right.
transcript.cn: 好的，行。

transcript.en: Karen: And I get a grade for this, don't I?
transcript.cn: 这个我会得到一个成绩，对吧？

transcript.en: Course tutor: Yes, your first one was graded by your tutor, but this one will be scored by the professor.
transcript.cn: 对，你的第一次是由你的导师评分的，但这次会由教授来打分。

transcript.en: Course tutor: But relax, the criteria will be consistent, and you'll get an unbiased result.
transcript.cn: 不过别紧张，评分标准是一致的，你会得到一个公正的结果。

transcript.en: Karen: Oh, and I've sorted out my modules for next year.
transcript.cn: 哦，我还把明年的课程模块选好了。

transcript.en: Karen: You asked me to tell you about my choices.
transcript.cn: 您之前让我跟您说说我的选择。

transcript.en: Course tutor: Yes, what've you decided?
transcript.cn: 是的，你决定选什么了？

transcript.en: Karen: Oh, it was really hard to determine.
transcript.cn: 哦，真的挺难决定的。

transcript.en: Karen: Hum, I've already done the Data Collection once, so that wasn't really a choice.
transcript.cn: 嗯，数据收集我已经修过一次了，所以那个其实没得选。

transcript.en: Karen: I couldn't make up my mind between Language and Society and Communication Skills.
transcript.cn: 我在《语言与社会》和《沟通技巧》之间拿不定主意。

transcript.en: Karen: I read the syllabuses but they sound more or less the same to me.
transcript.cn: 我看了教学大纲，但在我看来它们内容差不多。

transcript.en: Karen: Anyway, I went for Communication Skills in the end because I know the lecturer.
transcript.cn: 反正，我最后选了《沟通技巧》，因为我认识那个讲师。

transcript.en: Karen: Actually, Social Interaction seems to cover much the same ground, so I didn't bother with that either.
transcript.cn: 其实呢，《社会互动》看起来涵盖的内容也大致相同，所以那个我也没选。

transcript.en: Karen: Hum, I thought Discourse Analysis looked really interesting.
transcript.cn: 嗯，我觉得《话语分析》看起来真的很有意思。

transcript.en: Karen: It studies and analyses the texts beyond the literal meaning of the sentences.
transcript.cn: 它研究和分析超出句子字面意思的文本。

transcript.en: Karen: It looks into the connotation beyond the sentences.
transcript.cn: 它探究句子背后的深层含义。

transcript.en: Karen: And in fact, it also covers a little bit of Research Methodology in it, so I thought I'd do that, rather than the full methodology course.
transcript.cn: 而且实际上，它里面还涉及一点《研究方法论》的内容，所以我想选它，而不选完整的方法论课程。

transcript.en: Karen: Kill two birds with one stone as it were.
transcript.cn: 算是一举两得吧。

transcript.en: Karen: And then I fancied something drastically different, so I thought Psycholinguistics would be interesting, unless you think it'll be more worthwhile for me to do the Phonology course?
transcript.cn: 然后我想来点截然不同的，所以我觉得《心理语言学》会挺有意思，除非您觉得我修《音系学》这门课更值得？

transcript.en: Course tutor: No, I think you've made sensible choices.
transcript.cn: 不，我觉得你的选择很明智。

transcript.en: Course tutor: I'm glad you're organised.
transcript.cn: 我很高兴你这么有条理。

transcript.en: Course tutor: OK, let's meet again in a couple of weeks to see how you're getting on.
transcript.cn: 好，我们过几周再见一次，看看你的进展怎么样。

transcript.en: Karen: OK, thank you.
transcript.cn: 好的，谢谢您。

transcript.en: Karen: See you then.
transcript.cn: 那到时候见。

groups.title: Research on birds in Australia
groups.desc:
Questions 31-40
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.collect: Research on birds in Australia The study by Cunningham in 1995 It aimed to study birds which were $31$ in cities. • Methodology: – Researchers were able to $32$ rather than count the number of birds by some methods, such as random sampling. – Researchers studied bird's companionship habits using a $33$ system. – Researchers attached tags to birds' legs to identify their $34$ over time. • Findings: – Birds tended to choose the same nesting site in which they were raised. – Human activities such as $35$ had a negative effect on the reproduction of birds. • Measures taken by local organisations: – to increase birds' rate of $36$ in various ways – to reduce the dangers caused by $37$ farms, e.g., colliding with turbines The study by Conway in 2006 – Researchers monitored the $38$ of birds' nocturnal callings during flight. – $39$ were taken to listen to birds' sounds. – Data could be collected through noise detection devices placed at a great $40$ .

questions.title: It aimed to study birds which were 【   】 in cities.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 1995、birds、cities；提示词 were、in cities，此处应填形容词性词汇。
题目解析：小标题的时间定位词 1995 比较容易听到，题干中的 aimed to study 在录音中被替换为 The primary goal was to detect，定位词 birds 随后出现，而 cities 在录音中被替换为 urban regions，结合判断抓取合适的词汇即可。因此答案为 protected。

questions.title: Researchers were able to 【   】 rather than count the number of birds by some methods, such as random sampling.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 count；提示词 were able to，此处应填动词原形。
题目解析：本题难度不大，关键在于准确预判词性。本题与上一题之间间隔了两句无效信息之后才听到定位词 count 出现，紧接着便出现了转折信号词 Instead（相反）。需要注意的是，Instead 之前出现的 count 为否定的信息，对应题干中 rather than 之后的内容，而 Instead 之后出现的内容为说话人的重点，对应 rather than 之前的内容，也就是空白处的答案信息，所以抓取 Instead 后出现的动词原形即可。因此答案为 estimate。

questions.title: Researchers studied bird's companionship habits using a 【   】 system.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 companionship、system；提示词 a、system，此处应填修饰 system 的名词或形容词性词汇。
题目解析：首先听到并列信号词 In addition，据此可判断上一题语义信息的结束。随后听到答案和定位词 system 一起出现，虽然答案先于两个定位词出现，但定位词未发生任何替换，且题干和录音原文只是主动和被动的变化，难度不大。因此答案为 mapping。

questions.title: Researchers attached tags to birds' legs to identify their 【   】 over time.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 tags、birds' legs；提示词 their，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词距离答案较远，会影响做题心态。在听到含有定位词的句子之后，首先听到对 tagging process 的介绍，而题干考查的是这么做的最终目的，答案句随即出现："… to assess the trends of birds over 15 months." 其中 access 替换了题干中的 identify，over 15 months 对应 over time。因此答案为 trends。

questions.title: Human activities such as 【   】 had a negative effect on the reproduction of birds.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Human activities、reproduction；提示词 such as，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题距离上一题间隔信息较多，但通过题干给出的信息进行定位不难。定位词 Human activities 在录音中被替换为 humans，较容易识别。辅助定位词 reproduction（繁殖）在录音中被替换为 birth rates，注意这一替换表达为动物研究类话题的常见考点；此外，题干 had a … effect on 在录音中被替换为 had contributed greatly to。因此答案为 pollution。

questions.title: to increase birds' rate of 【   】 in various ways
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Measures、local organisations；提示词 of，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题空白处前后没有很好的定位词，只能利用小标题中的 Measures、local organisations 帮助定位。这两个定位词出现在同一句："… measures … taken by members from local animal conservation organisations to boost their alarming survival rates." 其中 local animal conservation organisations 为 local organisations 的具体展开替换，boost 替换了题干中的 increase，题干中的 rate 后置变为中心词。因此答案为 survival。

questions.title: to reduce the dangers caused by 【   】 farms, e.g., colliding with turbines
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 dangers、farms；提示词 farms，此处应填修饰 farms 的名词或形容词。
题目解析：通过观察题干与上一题并列可知，本题同样考查的是一项措施（measure），录音中的 A further measure 提示我们答案即将出现，重点听表示目的的表述，定位词 dangers 在录音中被反义替换为 safety，wind farms 为词组，意为"风力发电场"。因此答案为 wind。

questions.title: Researchers monitored the 【   】 of birds' nocturnal callings during flight.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 callings、during flight；提示词 the，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 callings 基本原词重现，可锁定答案句为："His team detected the calling frequency of seabirds flying at night." 其中 detected 替换了题干中的 monitored，flying 替换了 during flight，at night 替换了 nocturnal（夜间发生的）。另外，注意 A('s) B 等于 B of A。因此答案为 frequency。

questions.title: 【   】 were taken to listen to birds' sounds.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 birds' sounds；提示词 were taken，此处应填复数名词。
题目解析：通过录音中的并列信号词 also 可以判断出语义的递进，定位词 birds' sounds 在录音中表达为 sounds of … birds，题干中的被动形式 were taken 在录音中被转换为主动形式 took。因此答案为 Recordings。

questions.title: Data could be collected through noise detection devices placed at a great 【   】 .
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 noise detection devices；提示词 a great，此处应填单数名词。
题目解析：本题答案先于定位词出现，难度增加，在听录音时注意抓取符合预判的单数名词。继上一题结束后，我们听到："… all the sounds were recorded from a distance using microphones to detect noise." 在 distance 一出现时，可以先记下该词，因为它符合答案预判形式，紧接着听到了定位词 noise detection devices 的替换 microphones to detect noise，结合判断从而确定答案。注意 from/at a distance 都表示"远距离地"。因此答案为 distance。

transcript.en: Good afternoon, this is the 3rd session of the series of lectures on wildlife.
transcript.cn: 下午好，这是关于野生动物系列讲座的第三讲。

transcript.en: For this lecture, we're going to look at two studies on the habitat of birds and protection measures taken in Australia, including the basic methodology and related areas of research.
transcript.cn: 这一讲，我们要看两项关于鸟类栖息地以及澳大利亚所采取的保护措施的研究，包括基本的研究方法和相关的研究领域。

transcript.en: Now let me give you some background information about the first research project on birds.
transcript.cn: 现在，我先给大家介绍一下第一个鸟类研究项目的背景信息。

transcript.en: The study was carried out by R. B. Cunningham and his team from the Australian National University in 1995.
transcript.cn: 这项研究是由澳大利亚国立大学的R. B. 坎宁安和他的团队在1995年开展的。

transcript.en: The primary goal was to detect the breeding habits and resting sites of some birds, especially those protected species in urban regions.
transcript.cn: 主要目标是探查一些鸟类的繁殖习性和栖息地点，尤其是城市地区那些受保护的物种。

transcript.en: These species included birds like peregrine falcons and kestrels in Australia.
transcript.cn: 这些物种包括澳大利亚的游隼和红隼这类鸟。

transcript.en: The bird data set consisted of a total of 153 species recorded from 946 sites.
transcript.cn: 这套鸟类数据集总共包含从946个地点记录的153个物种。

transcript.en: One might expect that in order to obtain valid data on their distribution patterns and population densities, researchers had to count through binoculars.
transcript.cn: 人们可能会以为，为了获得关于鸟类分布模式和种群密度的有效数据，研究人员得用望远镜一只只数。

transcript.en: Instead, they managed to estimate with various standard distance sampling methods like random sampling.
transcript.cn: 然而，他们设法用各种标准的距离取样方法（比如随机取样）来进行估算。

transcript.en: In addition, a mapping system was used to study their companionship behaviour.
transcript.cn: 此外，还用了一套制图系统来研究它们的结伴行为。

transcript.en: It recorded proposed birds' nesting sites to monitor the mating behaviour of targeted species.
transcript.cn: 它记录了鸟类拟定的筑巢地点，以监测目标物种的交配行为。

transcript.en: To obtain valid data of birds' whereabouts, researchers attached identity tags to birds' legs transmitting radio signals.
transcript.cn: 为了获得鸟类行踪的有效数据，研究人员在鸟腿上系了发射无线电信号的身份标签。

transcript.en: The tagging process was done when the birds were between 5 and 7 days of age.
transcript.cn: 标记工作是在鸟出生5到7天大的时候进行的。

transcript.en: After the initial tagging, data was collected from subsets of radio-tagged birds, making it possible to assess the trends of birds over 15 months.
transcript.cn: 初次标记之后，研究人员从戴了无线电标签的鸟类子集中收集数据，从而得以评估这些鸟在15个月里的动向趋势。

transcript.en: So what did they find?
transcript.cn: 那么他们有什么发现呢？

transcript.en: Well, as it turned out, many of the birds tagged had the tendency to nest in the same habitat where they grew up.
transcript.cn: 结果表明，很多被标记的鸟都有回到自己长大的同一栖息地筑巢的倾向。

transcript.en: Their nesting sites were quite varied and included freshwater reed beds, tidal reed beds, agricultural crops and man-made sites.
transcript.cn: 它们的筑巢地点相当多样，包括淡水芦苇丛、潮汐芦苇丛、农作物地和人造场所。

transcript.en: Even though naturally occurring nests were common, birds sometimes accidentally nested in man-made devices like power towers, chimneys and tunnels.
transcript.cn: 尽管自然形成的鸟巢很常见，但鸟儿有时也会误在电塔、烟囱和隧道这类人造设施里筑巢。

transcript.en: This research also studied the impact of humans on bird communities and found out that pollution had contributed greatly to the declining birth rates of some species, which were considered to be extinct or threatened to vanish from the study area.
transcript.cn: 这项研究还考察了人类对鸟类群落的影响，发现污染很大程度上导致了一些物种出生率的下降，这些物种被认为已经灭绝，或者面临从研究区域消失的威胁。

transcript.en: These species are dependent on natural forests because of their breeding holes.
transcript.cn: 这些物种依赖天然森林，因为它们要在那里的树洞里繁殖。

transcript.en: They will become extinct when local natural forests continue to be polluted heavily.
transcript.cn: 如果当地的天然森林继续遭受严重污染，它们就会灭绝。

transcript.en: A number of measures were thus taken by members from local animal conservation organisations to boost their alarming survival rates.
transcript.cn: 因此，当地动物保护组织的成员采取了一系列措施，来提高它们那令人担忧的存活率。

transcript.en: Firstly, breeding boxes were placed in trees taking on the role of breeding holes that were contaminated.
transcript.cn: 首先，在树上放置了繁殖箱，来替代那些被污染的繁殖树洞。

transcript.en: Protection guidelines were also introduced strictly prohibiting killing, disturbance and habitat destruction.
transcript.cn: 还出台了保护准则，严格禁止捕杀、干扰和破坏栖息地。

transcript.en: A further measure was taken to ensure the safety of birds from wind farms.
transcript.cn: 还采取了进一步的措施，以确保鸟类免受风力发电场的威胁。

transcript.en: In fact, birds are sometimes shredded by wind-turbine blades.
transcript.cn: 事实上，鸟儿有时会被风力涡轮机的叶片绞碎。

transcript.en: A great deal of work was done on how to prevent them from colliding with turbines.
transcript.cn: 人们在如何防止它们撞上涡轮机方面做了大量的工作。

transcript.en: A case in point was protecting space for bird migration by ensuring that migratory routes were kept free.
transcript.cn: 一个典型的例子就是通过保持候鸟迁徙路线畅通，来为鸟类迁徙保护出空间。

transcript.en: Falcons generally cope well with wind turbines, but not in weather conditions where visibility is bad.
transcript.cn: 游隼一般能很好地应对风力涡轮机，但在能见度差的天气条件下就不行了。

transcript.en: So, with knowledge of how fast falcons fly, bird stations in northern Australia can notify wind farms further south of the falcons' approach so that turbines can be shut down as they pass by.
transcript.cn: 所以，根据对游隼飞行速度的了解，澳大利亚北部的鸟类观测站可以通知更南边的风力发电场游隼即将到来，这样在它们飞过时就能把涡轮机关停。

transcript.en: Then another piece of research was done a couple of years later by Conway in 2006.
transcript.cn: 接着，几年之后康威在2006年又做了另一项研究。

transcript.en: His team detected the calling frequency of seabirds flying at night.
transcript.cn: 他的团队探测了海鸟夜间飞行时的鸣叫频率。

transcript.en: Acoustic signals are important communication tools for birds.
transcript.cn: 声音信号是鸟类重要的交流工具。

transcript.en: These signals can indicate social cohesion, prey location and breeding behaviour.
transcript.cn: 这些信号能显示社群凝聚力、猎物位置和繁殖行为。

transcript.en: Courtship songs are common among various species during mating seasons.
transcript.cn: 求偶鸣唱在交配季节的各种物种中都很常见。

transcript.en: Males produce calling songs that attract distant females, and then courtship songs will induce nearby females to respond.
transcript.cn: 雄鸟会发出吸引远处雌鸟的鸣叫声，然后求偶鸣唱会引来附近的雌鸟回应。

transcript.en: Surveyors also took recordings of the sounds of all the individual birds detected.
transcript.cn: 调查人员还录下了所有被探测到的每一只鸟的声音。

transcript.en: A tablet PC was used to process detailed information like sound pitch, spectrum, length and timing of surveys.
transcript.cn: 他们用一台平板电脑来处理详细信息，比如音高、频谱、时长和调查的时间点。

transcript.en: To minimise the disturbance on the bird community, all the sounds were recorded from a distance using microphones to detect noise.
transcript.cn: 为了尽量减少对鸟群的干扰，所有声音都是用麦克风远距离探测采集的。

transcript.en: They found that the probability of call events was much higher for solitary birds commuting early and late in the day.
transcript.cn: 他们发现，对于在一天中清晨和傍晚独自出行的鸟来说，发出鸣叫的概率要高得多。

transcript.en: Further analyses indicated that during foraging, the frequency of calls was significantly greater for birds encountering schooling fish, and birds called sooner after a catch in these foraging scenarios, compared with when only single fish were encountered.
transcript.cn: 进一步的分析表明，在觅食时，遇到成群鱼类的鸟叫声频率明显更高，而且在这些觅食场景中，捕到猎物后鸟儿也会更快地鸣叫，相比之下，只遇到单条鱼时就不会这样。

transcript.en: The results of this study showed that increased calling activity in the presence of more profitable prey could be of crucial importance to seabirds that benefit from group foraging.
transcript.cn: 这项研究的结果表明，在有更丰厚猎物时增加鸣叫活动，对那些从群体觅食中获益的海鸟来说可能至关重要。

transcript.en: So, does anyone have more questions on …
transcript.cn: 那么，还有人对……有更多问题吗？
